label: About
title: About Canned Publishing
disclosure: Translations and plain-language summaries are AI-generated – read the original at the source for decisive details.
body:
Canned Publishing makes Swedish politics and news accessible to everyone living in Sweden – in twelve languages. We gather bills, municipal decisions, news and EU-related matters, and present each in three layers: a short summary, a plain-language explanation, and the full original text.

Sources always get credit. Every article states its source – the Swedish Parliament, municipalities, news media, EU institutions – and links to the original. We encourage you to read the original source; it is always the authoritative one.

The translations and plain-language summaries are produced with the help of AI. They may contain errors or shifts in nuance. Use them as a way in – for legally or factually decisive details, always read the original text on the source's website.
